intro: An MCP server for Harness FME (Split.io) — read, toggle, and manage feature flags and rule-based segments from your AI assistant. 28 tools with a confirm: true safety guard on every destructive operation.
install:
claude mcp add --transport stdio --scope user harness-fme \
  --env MCP_HARNESS_FME_API_KEY=your_api_key \
  -- npx --yes @kud/mcp-harness-fme@latest
